Snippet.title: Snippet
Snippet.description: A code snippet stored by the user.

language.description: The programming language of the snippet.

description.description: A short description of the snippet.

tags.description: List of tags associated with the snippet.

isFavorite.description: Whether the snippet is marked as favorite.

isPinned.description: Whether the snippet is pinned to the top.

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns this snippet.

lastCopiedAt.description: Timestamp of when the snippet was last copied.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the snippet was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of when the snippet was last updated.

folderId.description: The ID of the folder this snippet belongs to.

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns this folder.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the folder was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of when the folder was last updated.

folders.description: Collection of folders for organizing snippets.
